title: embeds_many for tags on a Post
prompt: Build MyApp.Blog.Post with an embeds_many of Tag, where Tag is an embedded_schema with :name and :color. Use `embeds_many :tags, MyApp.Blog.Tag` and cast_embed with Tag's changeset. Write both modules to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex.
tier_rationale: Canonical embeds_many declaration. Easy because the choice is explicit in the prompt.
